subject: Warp crashing at the subtomogram reconstruction step
body:
Dear Warp users,

I recently encountered crashing of Warp when reconstructing subtomograms. 
Full tomograms were reconstructed well as usual. The errors in the attached 
picture start with 

"Couldn't export the particles!
at Warp.WorkerWrapper.TomoExportParticles(String path, 
ProcessingOptionsTomoSubReconstruction options, float3 coordinates, float3 
angles) in
D:\Dev\warp2\WarpLib\WorkerWrapper.cs:line 197
...
"
I run Warp with 2 of 4090 GPU cards. 
Any suggestions on what I can try? Many thanks!

Best,
Xiaojie Zhang

PI, assistant professor
ShanghaiTech University

[image: Warp_error_reconstruct_subtomo.jpg]
